skeletons.template:
EXTERN ExitProcess:PROC
EXTERN GetStdHandle:PROC
EXTERN WriteConsoleA:PROC

.data
    message BYTE "Hello, MASM!", 0dh, 0ah ; 0dh, 0ah is CRLF
    messageLen EQU $ - message
    bytesWritten QWORD ?

.code
main PROC
    ; hStdOut = GetStdHandle(STD_OUTPUT_HANDLE)
    mov rcx, -11 ; STD_OUTPUT_HANDLE
    sub rsp, 32  ; Shadow space
    call GetStdHandle
    add rsp, 32
    mov rbx, rax ; Save handle in rbx

    ; WriteConsole(hStdOut, &message, messageLen, &bytesWritten, NULL)
    mov rcx, rbx
    lea rdx, message
    mov r8, messageLen
    lea r9, bytesWritten
    push 0
    sub rsp, 32
    call WriteConsoleA
    add rsp, 40

    ; ExitProcess(0)
    xor rcx, rcx
    sub rsp, 32
    call ExitProcess
main ENDP
END

EXTERN ExitProcess:PROC

; A function that adds two numbers
; Input: rcx = first number, rdx = second number
; Output: rax = sum
AddNumbers PROC
    mov rax, rcx
    add rax, rdx
    ret
AddNumbers ENDP

.code
main PROC
    ; Example of calling the function
    mov rcx, 10
    mov rdx, 32
    sub rsp, 32 ; Shadow space for call
    call AddNumbers
    add rsp, 32

    ; rax now holds 42
    ; Exit with the result
    mov rcx, rax
    call ExitProcess
main ENDP
END

EXTERN ExitProcess:PROC

.code
main PROC
    mov rcx, 5  ; Set loop counter to 5
    xor rax, rax ; Initialize accumulator

LoopStart:
    add rax, rcx
    dec rcx
    jnz LoopStart

    ; After loop, rax = 5 + 4 + 3 + 2 + 1 = 15

    ; Exit with the result
    mov rcx, rax
    call ExitProcess
main ENDP
END

EXTERN ExitProcess:PROC
EXTERN GetStdHandle:PROC
EXTERN ReadConsoleA:PROC
EXTERN WriteConsoleA:PROC

.data
    prompt BYTE "Enter text: "
    promptLen EQU $ - prompt
    bytesWritten QWORD ?
    bytesRead QWORD ?
.bss
    buffer BYTE 100 DUP(?)

.code
main PROC
    sub rsp, 64 ; Shadow space and local variables

    ; Get handles for input and output
    mov rcx, -10 ; STD_INPUT_HANDLE
    call GetStdHandle
    mov r10, rax ; Save stdin handle
    mov rcx, -11 ; STD_OUTPUT_HANDLE
    call GetStdHandle
    mov r11, rax ; Save stdout handle

    ; Write prompt to console
    mov rcx, r11
    lea rdx, prompt
    mov r8, promptLen
    lea r9, bytesWritten
    push 0
    call WriteConsoleA

    ; Read from console
    mov rcx, r10
    lea rdx, buffer
    mov r8, 100
    lea r9, bytesRead
    push 0
    call ReadConsoleA

    ; Exit
    xor rcx, rcx
    call ExitProcess
main ENDP
END

; To link, use a C runtime like msvcrt.lib
; mlink /subsystem:console /entry:main /defaultlib:msvcrt.lib yourfile.obj

EXTERN printf:PROC
EXTERN ExitProcess:PROC

.data
    format_str BYTE "The number is %d", 0dh, 0ah, 0

.code
main PROC
    sub rsp, 40 ; Shadow space + alignment

    ; Call printf(format_str, 123)
    lea rcx, format_str ; First argument (format string)
    mov rdx, 123        ; Second argument (the number)
    call printf

    xor rcx, rcx
    call ExitProcess
main ENDP
END
